title: Ronald Quinlan
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Ronald Quinlan
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

biography: Dr. Quinlan received his PhD in 2009 for his research that focused on the chemical functionalization of graphene for advanced applications. After successfully defending his thesis he took at job at the US Patent and Trademark office before joining the research and development group of the Materials and Power Systems Branch at the Naval Surface Warfare Center, Carderock in 2010. In 2014 Dr. Quinlan joined the Molecular Biology and Chemistry department at Christopher Newport University where he continues his research in industrial coatings and thin films, food and agricultural chemistry, and environmental chemistry.
education_entries: Ph D in Applied Science, The College of William and Mary
MS in Applied Science, The College of William and Mary
BS in Chemistry, The College of William and Mary
research_interests: The Quinlan group is actively investigating fundamental aspects of intumescent coatings and effects of growth conditions on the phytochemical output of brewing components.
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2026). Hop (Humulus lupulus L.) phytochemical profiles as a function of growth region by HPLC and GC-MS Analysis . ACS Omega.

Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2023). Science of Brewing: An Introduction to the Impact of Local Regions on a Favorite Fermented Beverage . American Chemical Society. Volume, 1455. Pages, 187-215.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Oxygen generation by carbon dioxide glow discharge and subsequent permeation through ultrathin silver membranes . Earth and Space Science. Pages, 16.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). Fast Response, Carbon-Black Coated, Vertically-Oriented Graphene Electric Double Layer Capacitors . Journal of the Electrochemical Society. Volume, 165. Issue, 5. Pages, A924-A931.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2016). Probing the electrode-electrolyte interface in cycled LiNi0.5Mn1.5O4 by XPS using Mg and synchrotron X-rays . Journal of the Electrochemical Society. Volume, 163. Issue, 14. Pages, A2911-2918.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2015). XPS investigation of the electrolyte induced stabilization of LiCoO2 and “AlPO4”-coated LiCoO2 composite electrodes . Journal of the Electrochemical Society.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2014). Fast Response, vertically oriented graphene nanosheet electric double layer capacitors synthesized from C(2)H(2). . ACS nano. Volume, 8. Issue, 6. Pages, 5873-82.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2013). Investigation of defects generated in vertically oriented graphene . Carbon. Volume, 64. Pages, 92–100.
awards_honors: Christopher Newport University's nominee for SCHEV's Rising Star, State Council for Higher Education for Virginia. (2018)

Presentations: Margaret Harlan, Brandi Ives, Dmitry Liskin, Andrew Higgs, Abbie Brehm, Kevin Kingsbury, Ronald Quinlan, ACS Fall 2025 National Meeting and Expo, "Modification of ASBC's Beer-4D method for the determination of ethanol utilizing gas chromatography: Flame ionization detecti," Washington DC. (2025)

Ronald Quinlan, Phillip Pond, David Mitchell, Dmitry Liskin, Andrew Higgs, Abbie Brehm, Kevin Kingsbury, ACS Fall 2025 National Meeting and Expo, "Quantifying the terroir of beer using HS-GCMS, HR LCMS, and GC-O," Washington DC. (2025)

Rhiannon Canfield, Ronald Quinlan, Jeffrey Carney, Dmitry Liskin, Andrew Higgs, , Abigail Brehm, Andrew Brockway, Ronald Quinlan, SERMACS 2024, "Simple Amine Protection Reaction as a Learning Tool in Organic, Analytical Undergraduate Laboratories.," Atlanta, GA. (2024)
Ronald Quinlan, Andrew Higgs, SERMACS 2023, "Internal standard or standard addition? Addressing the effects of COVID on the student matrix and course-to-course variabilit," Durham, NC. (2023)

Andrew Wujick, Christopher Balog, Celina Paoletta, Dmitry Liskin, Andrew Higgs, Kevin Kingsbury, Abigail Brehm, Andrew Brockway, Ronald Quinlan, SERMACS 2023, "Analysis of phenolic compounds found in beer as a function of malt terroir using HPLC and HR-LCMS," Durham, NC. (2023)
Ronald Quinlan, A Night with Industry, "Chemistry of the brewing industry...where art and science meet," Christopher Newport University. (2023)

Christopher Balog, Celina Paoletta, Dmitry Liskin, Andrew Higgs, Abbie Brehm, Kevin Kingsbury, Ronald Quinlan, ACS Spring 2023 National Meeting and Expo, "Characterization of aroma and taste profiles as a function of malt growth region in craft brewing by HPLC and GC-MS," Indianapolis, IN. (2023)

Celina Paoletta, Christopher Balog, Dmitry Liskin, Andrew Higgs, Abbie Brehm, Kevin Kingsbury, Ronald Quinlan, ACS Spring 2023 National Meeting and Expo, "Hop (Humulus lupulus) phytochemical profiles as a function of growth region by HR-LCMS and GCMS analysis," Indianapolis, IN. (2023)

Celina Paoletta, Christopher Balog, Dmitry Liskin, Andrew Higgs, Abbie Brehm, Kevin Kingsbury, Ronald Quinlan, ACS Spring 2022 National Meeting and Expo, "Hop (Humulus lupulus) acids and metabolite profiles in craft brewing cultivars by HPLC and GC-MS analysis," San Diego, CA (hybrid). (2022)

Ashlyn Edwards, George Quinlan, Enjhalika Esmena, Ronald Quinlan, ACS Spring 2022 National Meeting and Expo, "Investigating the buried interface during curing of intumescent films using time-elapsed infrared spectroscopy," San Diego, CA (hybrid). (2022)

Ashlyn Edwards, George Quinlan, Richard Webb, Ronald Quinlan, ACS Fall 2021 National Meeting and Expo, "Effects of component composition and solvent characteristics on the cure rate and stability of intumescent coatings," Atlanta, GA (hybrid). (2021)
Ronald Quinlan, Analytical Extravaganza Webinar Series, "Brewing up laboratory skills," virtual. (2021)
Ronald Quinlan, Virginia Energy Storage and Conversion Workshop, "A fundamental approach toward synthesis of synthetic electrode-electrolyte interphase films," Charlottesville, VA. (2019)

Ronald Quinlan, Andres Maeso, International Conference and Exhibition on Materials and Engineering, "The controlled synthesis and investigation of electrode-electrolyte interphase films on LMO," San Diego, CA. (2018)

Samuel Houle, Benjamin Genovese, Ronald Quinlan, Lisa Webb, Darlene Mitrano, Society for Neuroscience 2018, "Determining the fatty acid/lipid profiles of 3xTg-AD mice in plasma and in red blood cell membranes.," San Diego, CA. (2018)

Alexandra Rosado Carrion, Dilshan Premathilake, Ronald Outlaw, Ronald Quinlan, Virginia Academy of Science, "Determining the effects of surface defects on graphene-based EDLCs by an eQCM study," Longwood University. (2018)
Grants and Sponsored Research: Ronald Quinlan, Todd Gruber , Dmitry Liskin, Lisa Webb, Christopher Meighan, Darlene Mitrano, James Bogenpohl, "Shimadzu LCMS 9030 Acquisition," Sponsored by Shimadzu

Ronald Quinlan, Todd Gruber , Christopher Meighan, Lisa Webb, "MRI: Acquisition of Q-TOF LCMS for Multidisciplinary Research and Education at Christopher Newport University," Sponsored by National Science Foundation
Ronald Quinlan, "The investigation of film composition effects on cure rates," Sponsored by Tepromark Architectural Products
